items.html: Then these Mochin, called the Neshama [soul] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], were in the discernment of MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to Bina, and Aba and Ima coupled and corrected the Malchut not by means of ZA. The matter is that Leah had already been corrected, back to back, before Rachel — for first the illumination of Leah comes out, and afterwards the illumination of Rachel, and the two of them are still separate, though both receive their illumination by means of ZA. Afterwards, in the Nesirah [sawing apart], the two of them join together into one Partzuf, through the NHY [Netzah-Hod-Yesod] of Ima entering within them; and thus Rachel herself is found rising, back to back, up to the Keter of ZA, through her joining with Leah.
